title: linanthus ciliatus
intro: Linanthus ciliatus, also known as fringed linanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Linanthus ciliatus are attributed to its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Linanthus ciliatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
